text.title: Continuous Delivery Worked Example
text.summary: Worked example showing the methodology applied end-to-end, with a trace through the rules and the final spec artefact.

section.title: Trace
section.p: Team turns on releasable-per-commit by automating every gate except production promotion. Expand-contract migrations baked into CI. Rollback step paired with every deploy.

list.item: r1-r6 satisfied; manual approval only on prod promotion for high-risk changes.
